zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Haiden於1591年出生在英國艾可比勒利卡時，她的父親Richard Hadden25歲，母親Jane Adams22歲。她於1608年與Henry Mann在英國英格蘭結婚。她去世於1691年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡享年100歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可納頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Haiden于1591年出生在英国艾可比勒利卡时，她的父亲Richard Hadden25岁，母亲Jane Adams22岁。她于1608年与Henry Mann在英国英格兰结婚。她去世于1691年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可比勒利卡享年100岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可納頓。

nameMeanings.name: Haiden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

variants.name: Arden
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harwin
meanings: English (Norfolk): of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal name Hard(e)win (Old French Hard(o)uin, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hard ‘hardy’, ‘brave’ + win ‘friend’). Compare Harden 1.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Haiden was born in 1591, in Billericay, Essex, England, her father, Richard Hadden, was 25 and her mother, Jane Adams, was 22. She married Henry Mann in 1608, in England, United Kingdom. She died in 1691, in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 100, and was buried in Naughton, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Haiden est née en 1591, à Billericay, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hadden, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane Adams, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Mann en 1608, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1691, à Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 100 ans, et a été enterrée à Naughton, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Haiden 1591 in Billericay, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Hadden 25 und ihre Mutter Jane Adams 22. Sie hat 1608 in England, United Kingdom Henry Mann geheiratet. Sie starb 1691 im Alter von 100 Jahren in Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Naughton, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Haiden è nata il nel 1591 nel Billericay, Essex, England, sua padre, Richard Hadden, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jane Adams, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry Mann nel 1608, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Haidenが1591年にイギリスエセックスビラーイケイで生まれた時，父Richard Haddenは25歳，母Jane Adamsは22歳であった。1608年にイギリスイギリスでHenry Mannと結婚した。彼女は1691年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスビラーイカで100歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクナウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Haiden(이)가 1591년 영국 에세스 빌레리카이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Hadden(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Adams(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1608년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Henry Mann(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1691년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카에서 100세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 나그h턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Haiden nasceu em 1591, em Billericay, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hadden, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jane Adams, tinha 22 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Haiden родилась в 1591 г. в местности биллирикеи, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Hadden было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Adams, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Mann в 1608 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1691 г. в местности биллирика, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 100 лет и была похоронена в местности нотон, суффолк, Англия.
